title: selliguea stewartii
intro: Selliguea stewartii, also known as Stewart's Polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selliguea stewartii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selliguea stewartii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as poultices and salves.
